summary: An unofficial chord learning tool tailored for
home-page.remark: Chara (pronunciation: /ˈkɛərə/), β Canum Venaticorum, is the second-brightest star in the northern constellation of Canes Venatici.

adaptation.title: adapt
adaptation.lock-message: Load device layout and chords on Settings page to use the Adaptation page.

realization.title: realize
realization.lock-message: You need to have at least one chord passing the Adaptation phase to access the Realization page.

accumulation.title: accum
accumulation.lock-message: You need to have at least one chord passing the Realization phase to access the Accumulation page.

data-deletion-setting.device-layout-deleted: The loaded device layouts have been deleted.
data-deletion-setting.chords-deleted: All loaded chords have been deleted.

delete-device-layout-confirm-dialog.description: Are you sure to delete the loaded device layout?

delete-chords-confirm-dialog.description: Are you sure to delete all loaded chords?

visibility-setting.thumb-3-switch-help-button-aria-label: open help dialog for thumb 3 switch

thumb-3-switch-help-dialog.title: thumb 3 switch
thumb-3-switch-help-dialog.content: Master Forge doesn't have the thumb 3 switches as CharaChorder One, CharaChorder Two and CCU. If you use Master Forge, or you use CharaChorder One, CharaChorder Two or CCU but don't use the thumb 3 switches, you can uncheck this setting to hide them in the layout.

practice-set-size.label: practice set size
practice-set-size.hint: Number of chords to practice at the same time

min-reps-to-pass.label: min reps to pass
min-reps-to-pass.hint: Minimum number of practice for a chord required to pass the phase

min-speed-to-pass.label: min speed (ChPM) to pass
min-speed-to-pass.hint: Minimum entry speed for a chord required to pass the phase

chords-page.file-input-aria-label: file input for selecting a chord library file to load into this application
